//: DEV-ONLY typecheck config (CH33). `npm run typecheck` runs `tsc --noEmit` over the app's JS with JSDoc types тАФ no TypeScript migration, no emit, no shipped/runtime dependency. checkJs is OFF by default; typechecking is opt-in per file via a top `// @ts-check` line, so coverage grows incrementally (logic core first; DOM-heavy view modules later).
//exclude: A27: the Svelte staging app imports *.svelte modules tsc can't resolve; exclude it from the JS typecheck (it's checked by the Svelte compiler / svelte-check instead).
